mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, -- 🌟 사장님일 경우 가게 번호를 가져오는 서브쿼리 추가 (SELECT MIN(store_id) FROM store_tbl WHERE member_id = m.member_id) AS storeId FROM MEMBER_TBL m WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
AND m.MEMBER_GRADE = #{memberGrade}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_TBL ( MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_THUMB, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_ADDRCODE, MEMBER_ADDR, MEMBER_DETAIL_ADDR, MEMBER_GRADE, MEMBER_POINT, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, NULL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberAddrcode}, #{memberAddr}, #{memberDetailAddr}, 1, null, SYSDATE, 1 )
mapper.update: update member_tbl set member_status = 2 WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(get_point), 0) FROM order_tbl WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT NVL(SUM(get_point), 0) FROM order_tbl WHERE order_status = 4
mapper.update:
UPDATE MEMBER_TBL
SET MEMBER_ADDRCODE = #{memberAddrcode}, MEMBER_ADDR = #{memberAddr}, MEMBER_DETAIL_ADDR = #{memberDetailAddr}, LATITUDE = #{latitude}, LONGITUDE = #{longitude} WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from order_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} and order_status not in (0,5,9)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_tbl WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_tbl WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_tbl ( order_id, member_id, review_thumb, review_content, review_rating, review_date, store_id ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{memberId}, #{reviewThumb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewRating}, SYSDATE, #{storeId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tbl SET review_status = 1 WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.order_id AS orderId, o.review_status AS reviewStatus, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.review_rating AS reviewRating, r.review_thumb AS reviewThumb,
rc.review_comment_content AS reviewCommentContent, TO_CHAR(rc.review_comment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reviewCommentDate,
TO_CHAR(r.review_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reviewDate,
r.member_id AS memberId, m.member_thumb AS memberProfile, s.store_name AS storeName,
(SELECT SUM(price * quantity) FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = r.order_id) AS totalPrice,
(SELECT m2.menu_name FROM order_detail od JOIN menu_tbl m2 ON od.menu_id = m2.menu_id WHERE od.order_id = r.order_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS menuName,
(SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = r.order_id) AS extraCount
FROM review_tbl r JOIN order_tbl o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN store_tbl s ON r.store_id = s.store_id JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN review_comment_tbl rc ON r.order_id = rc.order_id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.review_date DESC

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, s.store_name AS storeName, TO_CHAR(m.reg_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDate, o.get_point AS pointAmount FROM order_tbl o JOIN order_list_map m ON o.order_id = m.order_id JOIN store_tbl s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND m.reg_date >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -3) ORDER BY m.reg_date DESC
